last_result: A generic minimize/maximize pairwise forest selector was implemented and tested. In the single pre-registered 90-instance development-only ablation, raw pairwise cost weighting failed promotion: LOEO mean improvement versus n2 was -0.140448%, compared with +0.086723% for the same unweighted forest and -0.189619% for cost_knn_k5; weighted worst-environment improvement was -0.317359%. The weighted hypothesis is refuted for direct activation, unweighted remains an exploratory clue only, and frozen CVRP v1 plus confirmation remain unchanged.
